text: Firebase single backend causes system failure during outage. Use multi-region database replication.
Stripe API downtime blocks payments. Always implement fallback payment gateway like Razorpay or PayPal.
Monolithic architecture fails under scaling pressure. Use microservices or modular architecture.
External API dependency causes runtime failure. Always add retry logic and caching layer.
Database overload leads to slow system response. Use indexing, caching, and load balancing.
